user.title: Recorder Throttle
user.description: Throttles per-entity DB writes (via rec-* labels). Configure the scan for new unthrottled heavy writers here.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured — only a single instance is supported.

init.title: Recorder Throttle — settings
init.description: Write rate above which an unthrottled entity is reported as a new heavy writer.

top_writers_summary.title: {count} unthrottled DB heavy writers
top_writers_summary.description:
**{count}** entities currently write unthrottled at ≥ {threshold}/min to the database, e.g.: {examples}.

Manage them in the "Recorder-Drosselung" card — throttle each or mark as accepted. This notice clears once all are handled.
